title: Marketplace Manager - Sugar Cosmetics - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Sugar Cosmetics - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Sugar Cosmetics! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Sugar Cosmetics:
Sugar Cosmetics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sugar Cosmetics!
